nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Saccharomyces/(Achyranthes Bidentata/Angelica Gigas/Angelica Pubescens/Angelica Tenuissima/Asarum Sieboldi/Cnidium Officinale/Ledebouriella Divaricata/Paeonia Suffruticosa) Root/Eucommia Ulmoides Bark/Magnolia Liliflora Bud Ferment Filtrate
chemicalDescription: Saccharomyces/(Achyranthes Bidentata/Angelica Gigas/Angelica Pubescens/Angelica Tenuissima/Asarum Sieboldi/Cnidium Officinale/Ledebouriella Divaricata/Paeonia Suffruticosa) Root/Eucommia Ulmoides Bark/Magnolia Liliflora Bud Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the roots of Achyranthes bidentata, Angelica gigas, Angelica pubescens, Angelica tenuissima, Asarum sieboldi, Cnidium officinale, Ledebouriella divaricata, Paeonia suffruticosa , the bark of Eucommia ulmoides and the buds of Magnolia liliflora by the microooganism, Saccharomyces.
inciName: SACCHAROMYCES/(ACHYRANTHES BIDENTATA/ANGELICA GIGAS/ANGELICA PUBESCENS/ANGELICA TENUISSIMA/ASARUM SIEBOLDI/CNIDIUM OFFICINALE/LEDEBOURIELLA DIVARICATA/PAEONIA SUFFRUTICOSA) ROOT/EUCOMMIA ULMOIDES BARK/MAGNOLIA LILIFLORA BUD FERMENT FILTRATE
